subcodes.first_line: We have adorned all existence with the remembrance of Our Name, which We sent forth aforetime to give unto mankind the glad-tidings of this Hidden Mystery [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد زینا الامکان بذکر اسمنا الذی ارسلناه من قبل لیبشر الناس بهذا السر المکنون
subcodes.subjects: @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution
